rows.label: qev015203_MSG0003
rows.name:
The project to build a water
purification plant in the Primordial
Wilderness has started, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015203_MSG0004
rows.name:
They get attacked by native creatures, construction
stalls due to a lack of resources... It's just
one terrible trouble after another![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015203_MSG0005
rows.name:
It was impossible after all!
Building a water purification
plant in such a dangerous place![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015203_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ugh... I hear the problems with the water
purification plant were resolved...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015203_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ajoa had such a triumphant look on her
face... Jeez! What an annoying woman![ST:wait ]
